data.title: Design system update: codify badge/banner whimsical-elegant style into reusable patterns

data.body: Once badges, banners, and Mandelbrot decorations are finalized, codify the design patterns into the stylesheet/design system so future components automatically get the whimsical-elegant touches (corner pins, card frames, Mandelbrot ornaments, color tagging, etc.). This is a cleanup/documentation task that comes after the component work settles.
Andrew wants to work on this collaboratively (recovery)
